name: Swift Title Loans
description_short: Fort Worth, TX Swift Title Loans at 814 Main St provides title loans and payday advances with same-day funding.
description_long:
Swift Title Loans operates from a standalone location at 814 Main St #1101 in Fort Worth, TX. This Fort Worth storefront serves the local community with extended business hours: Monday through Friday 9AM to 7PM and Saturday 10AM to 5PM for customer convenience.

At this Fort Worth location, customers can apply for title loans, payday loans, and other short-term lending products. Call +1 256-578-7103 to speak with a team member about your specific financial needs, learn about loan terms, or get answers to application questions. The staff here are ready to walk you through the process and help you qualify.

When you need emergency cash in Fort Worth, TX, come prepared with a valid ID, vehicle title or ownership documentation, and recent income verification to expedite your application. Title loans are designed for situations where you need fast access to funds without lengthy credit checks. Visit this Swift Title Loans location for a straightforward lending experience in Fort Worth.
pros: Same-day funding available for applications submitted by noon
Accepts borrowers with bad credit and past bankruptcies explicitly
Upper loan tier extends to $50,000, well above typical emergency lenders
Borrower retains use of their vehicle throughout the loan term
Extended weekday hours (9am–7pm) and Saturday availability (10am–5pm)
Online application process available alongside in-person service
Loan officer Alfred consistently praised across reviews for patience and plain-language explanations
cons: No APRs, fees, or loan term lengths disclosed anywhere on the website
Vehicle can be repossessed if the borrower defaults — a material risk not disclosed on the site
No mobile app, text payment reminders, or digital account management
Single Memphis location with no other branches listed
Domain name (cartitleloansla.com) does not match Tennessee branding, creating confusion
best_for: Memphis-area residents who own a vehicle outright and need cash the same day
Borrowers with bad credit or bankruptcy history who cannot qualify for a personal loan
Consumers who need more than a payday loan but want to use their car as collateral
Borrowers comfortable with in-person service and extended weekday hours
diagnosis: Swift Title Loans is best suited for Memphis residents who own a vehicle free and clear, need fast cash, and have been rejected elsewhere due to bad credit or bankruptcy. The main caveat is serious: the website discloses no APRs, fees, or repayment terms, so borrowers must request a full loan agreement before signing — title loans frequently carry triple-digit APRs and carry vehicle repossession risk on default.
services: In-person loan processing at Memphis branch
meta_description: Fort Worth, TX – Swift Title Loans at 814 Main St. Same-day title loans & payday advances, Mon-Sat.
